rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DENNY YEE KUN NG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant Terms Of Stipulated Settlement (Ccp Sec 664.6) And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Hearing will be continued to September 3, 2026 at 2:00 p.m., to be heard after The Regents of the University of California FBO the University of California at Berkeley's pending Petition for Orders (1) Determining Title to Personal Property; (2) Removal of Special Administrator; (3) Suspending Powers of Personal Representative Pending Resolution of This Petition; (4) Appointing Private Professional Fiduciary as Special Administrator; and (5) Directing Special Administrator to Account.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DARLEEN MIN LUM
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents' Tim Lum And Fuling Lum'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Memorandum In Support Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Hearing will be continued to June 17, 2026 at 2:00 p.m., due to availablity of court.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GLEN STEWART HOLLOWAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings By Petitioner, Laura Mccabe As To Objector, Dean Holloway?S Objection To The Petition For Letters Of Special Administration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorites
rulings.Rulings: Hearing will be continued to June 18, 2026 at 2:00 p.m., to be heard by Judge Russell S. Roeca.
